# The Dawg Pound Collective

The Dawg Pound Collective is a passionate, community-driven Cleveland Browns fan club based at Game On sports bar in North Olmsted, Ohio. The brand radiates intense team loyalty — orange and brown pride — combined with a warm, inclusive spirit that goes beyond football. The collective blends the electric energy of game day watch parties with a genuine commitment to local charitable causes including schools, veterans, women's shelters, and dog shelters. The 'Dawg' identity is central to the brand's personality — playful, loud, and fiercely devoted — while the community-giving mission adds heart and purpose to every Sunday gathering. Membership is free, making it accessible and welcoming to all Browns faithful.

Source: https://example.com

---

## Join the Ultimate Browns Game Day Community — The Dawg Pound Collective

URL: https://example.com
Description: Experience electric Browns watch parties, free membership, and a community that gives back through scholarships, fundraisers, and supporting veterans. Game On in North Olmsted—join the pack today!

Join the Ultimate Browns Game Day Community — The Dawg Pound Collective

# Join The Dawg Pound Collective at Game On


### Free membership. Electric game-day energy. Real community impact supporting schools, veterans, and local shelters.


Join the Collective
See Game Day Perks




















## Why Join The Dawg Pound Collective?


This is more than just a watch party; it's a vibrant community for Browns fans who bleed orange and brown. Membership is free, the perks are exclusive, and the impact is real — supporting local schools, veterans, women's shelters, and dog rescues right here in our community.











### Free Membership, No Strings


Becoming a member of The Dawg Pound Collective is absolutely free. No fees, no hidden costs — just pure Browns passion and an open invitation to join our growing family of dedicated supporters.










### Electrifying Game Day Atmosphere


Imagine cheering every play, celebrating every touchdown, and sharing every thrilling moment with a crowd as passionate as you are — all within the fantastic atmosphere of Game On in North Olmsted.










### Exclusive Members-Only Specials


Enjoy exclusive game day specials designed to make every Sunday even better. From food and drink deals to members-only giveaways, your membership comes with perks that elevate the experience.
























## Game Day at Game On


Every Sunday, The Dawg Pound Collective transforms Game On in North Olmsted into the ultimate Cleveland Browns headquarters. Feel the roar of the crowd, the pulse of every play, and the camaraderie of hundreds of fans who bleed orange and brown — all while giving back to the community we love.


- ### Pregame Gathering Arrive early, grab your seat, and soak in the anticipation. The energy builds with every handshake and high-five as the Dawg Pound faithful unite.

- ### Kickoff Intensity From the opening whistle to the final drive, experience every snap with a room full of passionate fans. The cheers are louder, the highs are higher, and the lows are shared together.

- ### Fourth-Quarter Celebration When the game is on the line, the Dawg Pound rises. Win or lose, we celebrate our team and our community — because being a Browns fan is about family, fun, and making a difference.
























## Cheering for Cleveland, Giving Back Locally


At The Dawg Pound Collective, game day is just the beginning. We channel our Browns passion into meaningful fundraisers that support the heart of our community — because real fans show up for their city year-round.








### Local Schools


We rally to fund scholarships and classroom resources for North Olmsted students, ensuring the next generation has every opportunity to succeed on and off the field.







### Our Veterans


We honor those who served by directing community donations to veteran support programs, ensuring our local heroes receive the gratitude and assistance they deserve.







### Women's Shelters


We stand with local women and families in need by organizing supply drives and fundraisers that provide safety, comfort, and a path forward.







### Dog Shelters


Every Dawg deserves a home. We partner with local shelters to provide supplies, adoption support, and plenty of love for our four-legged friends.





Our purpose goes beyond football. It's about building a stronger, more connected community where every touchdown celebration fuels real change. When you join The Dawg Pound Collective, you're not just a fan — you're a force for good.

Explore Community Impact











## Join the Dawg Pound for Free — Every Sunday at Game On!


This is more than just a watch party; it's a vibrant community for Browns fans who bleed orange and brown. Cheer every play, celebrate every touchdown, and share every thrilling moment with a crowd as passionate as you are — all while supporting local schools, veterans, women's shelters, and dog rescues through our fundraising initiatives.



Join the Collective



View Membership & Events















Fueling game-day passion and community pride — one tailgate, one cause, one neighborhood at a time.

## Score Free Membership &amp; Epic Game Day Fun — The Dawg Pound Collective

URL: https://example.com/membership-game-day
Description: Claim your free membership and dive into the loudest Browns game day experience at Game On. Expect high-energy watch parties, orange-and-brown pride, and a crew that feels like family. Don&#39;t just watch—belong!

Score Free Membership & Epic Game Day Fun — The Dawg Pound Collective






























Skip to main content















- Home
- Membership & Game Day
- Community Impact



Contact











Free Membership


# Join the Pack. Feel the Energy. Give Back.



Welcome to The Dawg Pound Collective — the ultimate game day destination for Cleveland Browns fans at Game On in North Olmsted. Signing up is 100% free, and you'll instantly become part of a welcoming community that celebrates every touchdown and supports local charitable causes.



Every Sunday, join fellow Browns faithful for exclusive game day specials, community fundraisers, and an electric atmosphere that supports schools, veterans, women's shelters, and dog shelters.


Become a Member — Free
Learn More

















## Why Join The Pack?


From game-day thrills to meaningful community impact, discover what makes being a Dawg Pound Collective member so special.









### Free Membership, No Strings


Becoming part of our family costs absolutely nothing. We believe passion for the Browns and love for our community should be open to everyone. Just show up, wear your orange and brown, and you're one of us.









### Exclusive Game-Day Specials


Enjoy members-only discounts on food, drinks, and merchandise every Sunday at Game On. From loaded nachos to ice-cold beverages, we make sure your game day experience is as delicious as it is electric.









### Unmatched Fan Camaraderie


Surround yourself with the loudest, proudest, and most loyal fans in Northeast Ohio. Every first down, every touchdown, every victory tastes better when you're celebrating with your fellow Dawgs.









### Community That Gives Back


We're more than football. Through our fundraisers and events, we support local schools, honor our veterans, aid women's shelters, and help every dawg find a home. Your cheers help fund real change.













★



## What to Expect on Sundays


Every game day at Game On follows a rhythm built on camaraderie, celebration, and community. Here's how a typical Sunday unfolds when you join the Dawg Pound Collective.









11:00 AM


### Arrival & Pre-Game Warm-Up


Doors open early at Game On in North Olmsted. Grab your seat, claim your favorite spot at the bar, and settle in with exclusive member-only food and drink specials. The big screens are tuned to NFL pre-game coverage, the orange and brown gear is everywhere, and the energy starts building well before kickoff. It's the perfect time to catch up with fellow fans, meet new members, and get ready to make some noise.











1:00 PM


### Watch-Party Energy & Fundraising


Kickoff unleashes the full Dawg Pound roar. Every first down, every touchdown, every defensive stand is celebrated like we're right there in the stadium. Between quarters, we run our community fundraising moments — 50/50 raffles, prize giveaways, and donation drives supporting local schools, veterans, women's shelters, and dog shelters. The game day fun fuels real impact, and every member gets a chance to contribute and win.











4:30 PM


### Postgame Celebration & Community


Win or lose, the Dawg Pound Collective sticks together. After the final whistle, we announce raffle winners, celebrate the day's fundraising totals, and share a toast to our Browns. It's a chance to swap stories, plan for the next watch party, and connect with the causes we support. Membership is free, the camaraderie is priceless, and every Sunday strengthens the bond between fans and our North Olmsted community.









Membership is absolutely free — just show up in your orange and brown and you're in the family.

Join the Collective








## What the Pound Loves


Hear from the faithful who make Sundays unforgettable.











### Mike D.


Longtime Browns Fan




"

The atmosphere at Game On is electric. Nothing beats the roar of the crowd when we score. It feels like being at the stadium, but with better food and cheaper drinks!











### Sarah L.


Local Supporter




"

I came for the football, but I stayed for the people. Everyone is so welcoming. It's not just a fan club; it's a family that genuinely cares about giving back to North Olmsted.











### Dave R.


Game On Regular




"

The community spirit here is unmatched. Knowing that our game day fun helps fund scholarships and support veterans makes every Sunday feel like a win, no matter the score.
















Fueling game-day passion and community pride — one tailgate, one cause, one neighborhood at a time.

## Powering Scholarships &amp; Fundraisers for Veterans — The Dawg Pound Collective

URL: https://example.com/community-impact
Description: Beyond the gridiron, we fuel real change: scholarships, fundraisers, and outreach for veterans, schools, women&#39;s shelters, and dog rescues. See how Browns fans turn passion into purpose and make a difference.

Powering Scholarships & Fundraisers for Veterans — The Dawg Pound Collective






























Skip to main content















- Home
- Membership & Game Day
- Community Impact



Contact












Our Mission


# Where Browns Pride Meets Community Service


The Dawg Pound Collective isn't just about cheering every touchdown at Game On — we're a family that believes the strongest teams are built off the field. From supporting local schools and veterans to lending a paw to women's and dog shelters, our orange-and-brown spirit fuels real change in North Olmsted and beyond.








Becoming a member is absolutely free, because passion shouldn't have a price tag. What sets us apart is our commitment to making a meaningful difference. Every game day, we rally together not only for the Browns but for the neighborhood we call home. Through fundraisers, charity drives, and volunteer events, we transform our collective energy into scholarships, essential supplies, and support for those who need it most.




### Rooted in the Neighborhood


We believe a strong community starts at home. That's why we partner with local schools to fund scholarships, support our brave veterans with essential resources, and ensure women's shelters have the supplies they need to provide safety and hope. Every dollar raised at our watch parties stays local, making an immediate impact where it matters most.





### Fandom with Purpose


Being a Browns fan is about heart, loyalty, and showing up — and that extends far beyond the stadium. We channel that same dedication into service. Because every dawg deserves a home, we're proud to support local dog shelters, ensuring our four-legged friends find the love and care they need. When you join The Dawg Pound Collective, you're not just joining a fan club; you're joining a movement that proves game day fun and community giving go hand in hand.
























## Who We Support


The Dawg Pound Collective is more than a watch party. Every Sunday, we rally our Browns family to raise funds and visibility for the causes that strengthen our community. From local classrooms to veterans' services, women's shelters to rescue pups — when we cheer, we give back.










### Local Schools


We invest in our future by supporting local schools through scholarship fundraisers and supply drives. Every dollar raised during our game day specials helps provide students and teachers with the resources they need to succeed right here in North Olmsted.










### Our Brave Veterans


We honor those who served by partnering with local veterans' organizations. Our community fundraisers help provide essential services, job placement support, and a welcoming space for veterans to enjoy game day camaraderie with fellow fans.










### Women's Shelters


We stand with women and families in transition by raising funds and collecting essential items for local women's shelters. Our collective believes in creating safe, supportive spaces — and that mission extends far beyond the stadium.










### Dog Shelters


Every Dawg deserves a home. We partner with local dog shelters to sponsor adoption events, collect food and supplies, and raise awareness for rescue pups. Because being part of the Dawg Pound means looking out for all dawgs.











## Our Collective Momentum


Every Sunday, we bring the noise for the Browns. But our impact goes far beyond game day — here's how we're making a difference in North Olmsted and beyond.




$50K+

Raised for Local Charities

From schools to shelters, every dollar fuels our community-first mission.



1,200+

Active Members Strong

A growing family of Browns faithful, united by passion and purpose.



40+

Community Partners

Veterans' groups, women's shelters, dog rescues, and local schools.



80+

Scholarships & Fundraisers

Empowering students and rallying support through game day fun.










## Community Partners & Sponsors


We believe in the power of community. Our partners and sponsors are the backbone of our mission, helping us support local schools, veterans, women's shelters, and dog shelters right here in North Olmsted. Together, we're making a real difference—one Sunday at a time.


























Are you a local business or organization that shares our passion for community and Browns football? We'd love to partner with you. Let's work together to make our community stronger and our game days even more memorable.

Become a Partner












Fueling game-day passion and community pride — one tailgate, one cause, one neighborhood at a time.

# Get in Touch with The Dawg Pound


Whether you're looking to join the collective, explore a community partnership, or learn more about our upcoming game day events and fundraisers — we'd love to hear from you. Membership is free and open to all Cleveland Browns faithful.






Game On Sports Bar & Grill
North Olmsted, Ohio


Contact Us















## Get In Touch, Dawg!


Ready to join the collective, partner with us, or support a local cause? Fill out the form below and we'll holler back faster than a Nick Chubb breakaway.

- Become a member (it's free!)

- Partnership & sponsorship inquiries

- Support veterans, schools & shelters

- General questions & game day info





Already a member? Join the conversation and stay connected with the pack!
























## Visit The Dawg Pound At Game On


The official home of Cleveland Browns watch parties in North Olmsted — where every Sunday feels like a home game.











### Where To Find Us


Game On Sports Bar & Grill North Olmsted, Ohio


Join us every Sunday during football season for the ultimate Browns watch party experience. Plenty of parking, great food, and cold drinks await.










### Electric Game-Day Atmosphere


Feel the energy from kickoff to the final whistle. Surround sound game audio, wall-to-wall screens, and a crowd that brings the Cleveland noise. Every touchdown feels like you're in the stadium.










### Your First Visit


Walk in as a fan, leave as family. Our crew will welcome you with open arms — grab a seat, order some wings, and get ready to cheer. Membership is free and signing up takes seconds. All ages welcome.









Game On












Ready to join the collective?

Become A Member — It's Free

This is more than just a watch party — it's a movement of Browns faithful who show up, make noise, and give back to the community we all share. Join us at Game On in North Olmsted and be part of something special.


Become a Member — It's Free

## Privacy Policy

URL: https://example.com/privacy
Description: Our privacy policy - how we collect, use, and protect your information

Privacy Policy































- Home
- Membership & Game Day

# Privacy Policy



Last Updated:  6/13/2026



The Dawg Pound Collective ("Company", "we", "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use and protect your information when you use our website [business_website] ("Service").


## 1. Information Collection


We may collect the following types of information:


- Personal Information: Name, email address, phone number and address

- Technical Information: IP address, browser type, operating system and website usage data

- Cookies: Information stored on your computer to improve user experience




## 2. Use of Information


We use the collected information for the following purposes:


- Providing requested services

- Improving service and user experience

- Contacting you regarding our services

- Compliance with legal requirements




## 3. Information Sharing


We do not sell, rent or share your personal information with third parties, except in the following cases:


- With your explicit consent

- When required by law

- To protect our rights or user safety

- With service providers who assist in operating the service (under confidentiality agreements)




## 4. User Rights


In accordance with Israeli Privacy Protection Law 1981, you have the following rights:


- Right to access personal information stored about you

- Right to correct inaccurate or incomplete information

- Right to delete personal information in certain circumstances

- Right to object to information processing for marketing purposes

- Right to file a complaint with the Data Protection Authority




## 5. Cookies


Our website uses cookies to improve user experience. You can manage cookies through your browser settings. Disabling cookies may affect website functionality.


## 6. Information Security


We implement reasonable security measures to protect your information, including encryption, firewalls and restricted access control. However, no transmission or storage method is 100% secure.


## 7. Policy Changes


We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Material changes will be posted on the website with 30 days advance notice.



## 8. Contact Information


For questions or requests regarding this privacy policy, please contact us:


- Company: The Dawg Pound Collective

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]



Data Protection Authority: For complaints, you may contact the Data Protection Authority at the Ministry of Justice

## Accessibility Statement

URL: https://example.com/accessibility
Description: Our accessibility statement - our commitment to digital accessibility

Accessibility Statement































- Home
- Membership & Game Day
- Community Impact



Contact








# Accessibility Statement



Last updated:  June 13, 2026



The Dawg Pound Collective is committed to making our services accessible to all users. We strive to implement the Israeli Standard (TI 5568) based on WCAG 2.1 Level AA guidelines.


Accessibility Level: AA (Israeli Standard TI 5568)



## 1. Accessibility Policy


We believe in equal rights and the right of every person to receive information and services independently and equally. This website was designed and built with special emphasis on accessibility for people with disabilities.


## 2. Accessibility Arrangements on the Site


- Keyboard navigation support

- Screen reader compatibility

- Appropriate color contrast

- Flexible and scalable font sizes

- Descriptive image alt text

- Hierarchical heading structure

- Clear and descriptive links

- Support for 200% zoom without content loss





### WCAG 2.1 Compliance


The website complies with WCAG 2.1 Level AA, which includes:


- Perceivable: Information is presented in ways users can perceive

- Operable: Interface components are operable

- Understandable: Information and user interface are understandable

- Robust: Content can be interpreted by a variety of technologies





## 3. Supported Assistive Technologies


- NVDA (Windows)

- JAWS (Windows)

- VoiceOver (Mac/iOS)

- TalkBack (Android)

- Dragon NaturallySpeaking

- Switch navigation




## 4. Accessibility Testing


The website has been tested using:


- Automated accessibility testing tools

- Manual testing with screen readers

- Keyboard-only navigation

- Color contrast verification

- Testing with users with disabilities




## 5. Continuous Improvements


We are continuously working to improve the accessibility of our website and update it according to technological developments and user feedback.



## 6. Contact and Feedback


If you encounter an accessibility issue on the site or need assistance, please contact us:


- Company: The Dawg Pound Collective

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]



Response time: We respond to accessibility inquiries within 3 business days and work to resolve issues within 10 business days.

## Terms & Conditions

URL: https://example.com/terms
Description: Terms of service - user rights and obligations

Terms & Conditions































- Home
- Membership & Game Day
- Community Impact



Contact








# Terms of Use



Last updated:  June 13, 2026



Use of this site constitutes agreement to the terms outlined below. Please read carefully before use.



## 1. Definitions


- "Company" - The Dawg Pound Collective

- "User" - Anyone who browses or uses the site

- "Services" - Sports & Entertainment / Community Organization provided through the site




## 2. Description of Services


The Dawg Pound Collective provides Sports & Entertainment / Community Organization through the site. The services are subject to the terms detailed in this document and may change from time to time.


## 3. Terms of Use


Use of the site is conditional on compliance with the following terms:


- Use of the site for lawful purposes only

- No interference with site operations or other users

- No uploading of offensive, illegal, or harmful content

- Respect for copyright and intellectual property rights

- No actions that may compromise site security




## 4. User Obligations


- Providing accurate and truthful information during registration or ordering

- Maintaining confidentiality of account access details

- Immediate notification of any unauthorized account use

- Updating personal information as needed




## 5. Payment and Refund Policy


If services include payment:


- Payments are processed through secure and encrypted systems

- Prices include applicable taxes as required by law

- Right to cancel will be in accordance with consumer protection laws

- Refunds will be processed within 14 business days of cancellation approval




## 6. Limitation of Liability


Services are provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. The Company will not be liable for indirect, consequential, or special damages arising from use of the site, except where required by law.


## 7. Copyright and Intellectual Property


All content on the site, including text, images, design, and code, is protected by copyright owned by The Dawg Pound Collective. Reproduction, distribution, or commercial use of content is prohibited without written permission.


## 8. Privacy


Collection and use of personal information is subject to our Privacy Policy. Use of the site constitutes agreement to the Privacy Policy as detailed separately.


## 9. Changes to Terms of Use


The Company may change these terms of use at any time. Material changes will be posted on the site with 30 days advance notice. Continued use after changes constitutes agreement to the new terms.


## 10. Service Termination


The Company may suspend or limit service at any time, including in cases of terms of use violations. In case of service termination, relevant provisions will remain in effect.


## 11. Governing Law and Dispute Resolution


These terms of use are governed by applicable laws. Any disputes will be resolved in accordance with local jurisdiction, with preference given to arbitration or mediation where possible.


## 12. General Provisions


- If any portion of the terms is found invalid, remaining terms will remain in effect

- Non-enforcement of a right will not be considered a waiver

- These terms of use constitute the entire agreement between the parties





## 13. Contact Information


For questions or clarifications regarding the terms of use:


- Company: The Dawg Pound Collective

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]
